series_metadata.series_description: Includes information for clinical and toxicology testing which primarily tests for alcohol content from specimens collected by coroner clinicians, legal authorities, public and privated medical providers. Includes informaiton on patient/client/suspect, so

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office for six months, then transfer to the State Records Center. Maintain at the State Records Center for 1.5 years, then destroy provided that no record is needed for court activity. Maintain for two years, then des- troy., Paper: Wastepaper
